message:
fix(fsqlite-mvcc): clippy pedantic/nursery fixes for index_regen + write_coordinator

Address clippy::derivable_impls, or_fun_call, match_same_arms, float_cmp,
needless_pass_by_value, cast_sign_loss, too_many_lines, cast_possible_wrap,
map_unwrap_or, and significant_drop_tightening across index_regen.rs,
write_coordinator.rs, and bocpd.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
